reference: If the pain is severe, you may do hot fomentation, apply Voltaren or a muscle relaxant gel, do minimal movement of your back, and take over-the-counter pain medications like Tylenol or Advil two to three times after meals. Do not lift heavy objects or perform bending tasks. Wait for the therapy.
text: If the pain is severe, you may do hot fomentation, apply Voltaren or a muscle relaxant gel, do minimal movement of your back, and take over-the-counter pain medication like Tylenol or Advil two to three times after meals. Do not lift heavy objects or perform bending tasks. Wait for the therapy.
